inputs.label: Applied Force
inputs.businessContext: The external force acting on the component, e.g., tension, compression, or shear.

businessContext_i18n.en: The external force acting on the component, e.g., tension, compression, or shear.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşene etki eden dış kuvvet, örn. çekme, basma veya kesme.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die auf das Bauteil wirkende äußere Kraft, z. B. Zug, Druck oder Scherung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La force externe agissant sur le composant, par exemple tension, compression ou cisaillement.
businessContext_i18n.es: La fuerza externa que actúa sobre el componente, ej., tensión, compresión o cortante.

inputs.label: Cross-Sectional Area
inputs.businessContext: The effective cross-sectional area resisting the force.

businessContext_i18n.en: The effective cross-sectional area resisting the force.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die effektive Querschnittsfläche, die der Kraft widersteht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La section transversale effective résistant à la force.
businessContext_i18n.es: El área de sección transversal efectiva que resiste la fuerza.

inputs.label: Material Yield Strength
inputs.businessContext: Stress at which material begins to deform plastically, typically from material datasheet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stress at which material begins to deform plastically, typically from material datasheet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin plastik olarak deforme olmaya başladığı gerilim, genellikle malzeme veri sayfasından alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Spannung, bei der das Material beginnt, sich plastisch zu verformen, typischerweise aus dem Datenblatt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte à laquelle le matériau commence à se déformer plastiquement, généralement issue de la fiche technique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión a partir de la cual el material comienza a deformarse plásticamente, normalmente de la ficha técnica del material.

inputs.label: Ultimate Tensile Strength
inputs.businessContext: Maximum stress material can withstand while being stretched or pulled before breaking.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum stress material can withstand while being stretched or pulled before breaking.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin kırılmadan önce çekme veya germe sırasında dayanabileceği maksimum gerilim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Spannung, die das Material beim Dehnen oder Ziehen aushält, bevor es bricht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte maximale que le matériau peut supporter en étant étiré ou tiré avant rupture.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión máxima que el material puede soportar al ser estirado o tirado antes de romperse.

inputs.label: Required Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: The minimum allowable factor of safety as per design standards, used for pass/fail check.

businessContext_i18n.en: The minimum allowable factor of safety as per design standards, used for pass/fail check.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım standartlarına göre izin verilen minimum emniyet faktörü, geçer/kalır kontrolü için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der minimal zulässige Sicherheitsfaktor gemäß Auslegungsnormen, verwendet für Bestanden/Nicht bestanden-Prüfung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le facteur de sécurité minimal admissible selon les normes de conception, utilisé pour le contrôle succès/échec.
businessContext_i18n.es: El factor de seguridad mínimo permitido según las normas de diseño, utilizado para la verificación de aprobado/reprobado.

inputs.label: Stress Concentration Factor (Kt)
inputs.businessContext: Factor accounting for geometric discontinuities. For basic analysis, set to 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor accounting for geometric discontinuities. For basic analysis, set to 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geometrik süreksizlikleri hesaba katan faktör. Temel analiz için 1 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor zur Berücksichtigung geometrischer Unstetigkeiten. Für einfache Analyse auf 1 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur tenant compte des discontinuités géométriques. Pour une analyse de base, définir à 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor que tiene en cuenta las discontinuidades geométricas. Para un análisis básico, ajustar a 1.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
